html.zh: Transformer 用堆叠的自注意力和前馈模块替代循环序列建模。它最初用于机器翻译，后来成为 BERT、GPT 式语言模型、多模态基础模型以及许多现代 AI 系统背后的架构。
html.en: The Transformer replaced recurrent sequence modeling with stacked self-attention and feed-forward blocks. Introduced for machine translation, it became the architecture behind BERT, GPT-style language models, multimodal foundation models, and many modern AI systems.

html.zh: 每个令牌与其他令牌建立 query-key-value 注意力连接，从而实现并行序列建模。互动演示应突出自注意力如何替代循环式处理。
html.en: Every token builds query-key-value attention links to other tokens, allowing parallel sequence modeling. The demo should highlight how self-attention replaced recurrent processing.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Transformer 视为现代 AI 的定义性架构之一。它的长期影响在于可扩展的自注意力配方重塑了自然语言处理、视觉、语音、代码、智能体和基础模型研究。
html.en: Experts generally treat the Transformer as one of the defining architectures of modern AI. Its long-term legacy is the scalable self-attention recipe that reorganized natural language processing, vision, speech, code, agents, and foundation-model research.

displayDescription.en: In 2017, the Transformer replaced recurrent sequence processing with stacked self-attention and feed-forward modules. The deep-learning storyline highlights the architectural shift away from recurrence and convolution, while the AI100 materials explain the scalable query-key-value mechanism that later powered BERT, GPT, multimodal foundation models, and many agent systems.
displayDescription.zh: 2017年，Transformer 用堆叠的自注意力和前馈模块替代循环序列处理。深度学习发展线强调它摆脱循环和卷积的架构转向，AI100 资料则解释可扩展的 query-key-value 机制如何进一步支撑 BERT、GPT、多模态基础模型和许多智能体系统。
